hotels.name: Hotel Poli Urban By AFI Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
Le nouvel hГғВҙtel POLI URBAN se trouve ГғВ  200 mГғВЁtres de la plage publique, sur front de mer de Tel-Aviv, ГғВ  20 minutes en voiture de l'aГғВ©roport Ben-Gurion. Les chambres sont ГғВ©quipГғВ©es dГўвӮ¬в„ўune connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision par satellite ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat.
Un lieu de vacances parfait ГғВ  Tel Aviv, ГғВ  2ГӮВ minutes ГғВ  pied de la mer et de la promenade. LГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВҙtel est adaptГғВ© aux personnes ГғВ  mobilitГғВ© rГғВ©duite.
Veuillez noter que les samedis et le dernier jour des fГғВӘtes juives, l'enregistrement est possible uniquement une heure aprГғВЁs la fin du Shabbat/de la fГғВӘte.
Les couples apprГғВ©cient particuliГғВЁrement l'emplacement de cet ГғВ©tablissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,7 pour un sГғВ©jour ГғВ  deux.
Les distances indiquГғВ©es dans la description de l'ГғВ©tablissement sont calculГғВ©es avec ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
The new POLI URBAN hotel is 200 metres from the public beach on Tel AvivГўвӮ¬в„ўs sea front, and a 20-minute drive from Ben-Gurion Airport. Rooms have free Wi-Fi, and a flat-screen TV with satellite channels.
A perfect Tel Aviv vacation spot, 2-minutes walk from the sea and the promenade. The hotel is wheelchair friendly.
Please note that on Saturdays and the final day of Jewish holidays, check-in is only possible after one hour after the Shabbat/holiday ends
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.7 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: The Arbel Tel Aviv
hotels.description_fr:
L'The Arbel Tel Aviv se trouve en plein cГ…вҖңur du quartier commerГғВ§ant de Tel Aviv, ГғВ  quelques pas de la rue Dizengoff et ГғВ  10 minutes ГғВ  pied de la plage. Il propose des appartements avecГӮВ climatisation etГӮВ connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Tous les appartements comprennent une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision par satellite et une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e. Des services de blanchisserie, de fax et de photocopies sont assurГғВ©s. Une chaise haute et une baignoire pour bГғВ©bГғВ© pourront ГғВӘtre fournies sur demande.
Le petit-dГғВ©jeuner est servi dans un cafГғВ© ГғВ  proximitГғВ©.
L'The Arbel Tel Aviv assure gratuitement un service de location de vГғВ©los, parfaits pour dГғВ©couvrir Tel Aviv. La place Rabin, la plus grande place publique de Tel Aviv, est ГғВ  seulement 10 minutes de marche.
hotels.description_en:
The Arbel Tel Aviv is right in the heart of Tel Aviv's shopping district around Dizengoff Street, a 10-minute walk from the beach. Apartments feature air conditioning and free Wi-Fi.
Each apartment at Arbel comes with satellite TV and a fully equipped kitchen. Laundry, fax, and photocopying services are available, and a high chair and baby bathtub are provided upon request.
Breakfast is provided at a cafГғВЁ nearby.
Bikes are free at Arbel Suites and are a great way to explore Tel Aviv. Rabin Square, the largest public square in Tel Aviv, is only 10 minutes away on foot.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
El The Arbel Tel Aviv se encuentra en pleno distrito comercial de Tel Aviv, cerca de la calle Dizengoff y a 10 minutos a pie de la playa. Dispone de apartamentos con aire acondicionado y WiFi gratuita.
Los apartamentos del Arbel tambiГғВ©n cuentan con TV vГғВӯa satГғВ©lite y cocina completamente equipada. Bajo peticiГғВіn, se ofrece servicio de lavanderГғВӯa, servicio de fax y fotocopias, y una trona y baГғВұera para bebГғВ©s.
El desayuno se sirve en una cafeterГғВӯa cercana.
El Arbel Suites proporciona servicio gratuito de alquiler de bicicletas y estГғВЎ a solo 10 minutos a pie de la plaza Rabin, la mayor plaza pГғВәblica de Tel Aviv.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,8 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripciГғВіn del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMapГӮВ©
hotels.description_pt:
O The Arbel Tel Aviv estГғВЎ situado mesmo no centro do bairro comercial de Telavive, perto da Rua Dizengoff, a uma caminhada de 10 minutos da praia. Os seus apartamentos estГғВЈo equipados com ar condicionado e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.
Cada apartamento do Arbel inclui televisГғВЈo por satГғВ©lite e uma cozinha totalmente equipada. DispГғВөe de serviГғВ§osГӮВ de lavandaria, de fax e fotocГғВіpias, e alГғВ©m disso providencia uma cadeira alta e banheira para bebГғВ©s, mediante pedido.
O pequeno-almoГғВ§o ГғВ© servido num cafГғВ© nas proximidades.
No Arbel Suites, as bicicletas sГғВЈo gratuitas e sГғВЈo uma ГғВіptima maneira de explorar Telavive. A PraГғВ§a Rabin, a maior praГғВ§a pГғВәblica em Telavive, estГғВЎ apenas a 10 minutos a pГғВ©.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localizaГғВ§ГғВЈo ГўвӮ¬вҖң deram uma pontuaГғВ§ГғВЈo de 9,8 para uma viagem a dois.
hotels.description_it:
Situato nel cuore del quartiere dello shopping di Tel Aviv, nei pressi della Via Dizengoff e a soli 10 minuti a piedi dalla spiaggia, l'The Arbel Tel Aviv offre appartamenti climatizzati con WiFi gratuito.
Negli alloggi, provvisti di TV satellitare e cucina completamente attrezzata, potrete richiedere un seggiolone e una vaschetta da bagno per bambini. In loco avrete inoltre a disposizione servizi di fax/fotocopie e lavanderia.
La colazione vi sarГғВ  servita presso un bar nelle vicinanze.
Ubicata a soli 10 minuti a piedi da Piazza Rabin, la piГғВ№ grande piazza pubblica di Tel Aviv, la struttura fornisce gratuitamente biciclette per esplorare la cittГғВ .
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,8 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Hotel Jacob Samuel by Prima Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
Le Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv est situГғВ© ГғВ  Tel Aviv, ГғВ  600ГӮВ mГғВЁtres de la plage Hilton. Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  proximitГғВ© de lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt prisГғВ©s, tels que la piscine Gordon, la rue Dizengoff et la place Kikar Hamedina. LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement se situe ГғВ  2ГӮВ km du mГғВ©morial Itzhak Rabin et ГғВ  2,3ГӮВ km du parc Meir.

Tous les logements de lГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВҙtel comportent une machine ГғВ  cafГғВ©. Les chambres sont pourvues de la climatisation. Certaines incluent une terrasse. Tous les hГғВ©bergements du Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv comprennent une salle de bains privative, munie dГўвӮ¬в„ўun sГғВЁche-cheveux et dГўвӮ¬в„ўarticles de toilette gratuits.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  2,4 km du centre commercial Dizengoff et ГғВ  2,5 km du musГғВ©e dГўвӮ¬в„ўart de Tel-Aviv.
hotels.description_en:
Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv is situated in Tel Aviv, 600 metres from Hilton Beach. Popular points of interest nearby include Gordon Swimming Pool, Dizengoff Square and Kikar Ha-Medina. The property is 2 km from Itzhak Rabin Memorial and 2.3 km from Meir Park.

All units in the hotel are equipped with a coffee machine. The rooms are equipped with air conditioning, and some rooms are fitted with a terrace. At Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv all rooms are fitted with a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer.

Dizengoff Center is 2.4 km from the accommodation, while Tel Aviv Museum of Art is 2.5 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ben Gurion Airport, 26 km from the property.

Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.5 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
El alojamiento Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv estГғВЎ ubicado en Tel Aviv, a 600ГӮВ metros de la playa Hilton. Hay varios lugares de interГғВ©s cercanos, entre ellos la piscina Gordon, la plaza Dizengoff y la plaza Kikar Ha-Medina. El monumento a Isaac Rabin estГғВЎ a 2 km, mientras que el parque Meir queda a 2,3 km.

Todos los alojamientos del hotel estГғВЎn equipados con cafetera. Las habitaciones tienen aire acondicionado y algunas cuentan con terraza. Todas las habitaciones del alojamiento Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv disponen de baГғВұo privado con secador de pelo y artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos.

El hotel se encuentra a 2,4ГӮВ km del centro comercial Dizengoff Center y a 2,5ГӮВ km del Museo de Arte de Tel Aviv. El aeropuerto Ben-GuriГғВіn, situado a 26ГӮВ km, es el mГғВЎs cercano.
hotels.description_pt:
Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv is situated in Tel Aviv, 600 metres from Hilton Beach. Popular points of interest nearby include Gordon Swimming Pool, Dizengoff Square and Kikar Ha-Medina. The property is 2 km from Itzhak Rabin Memorial and 2.3 km from Meir Park.

All units in the hotel are equipped with a coffee machine. The rooms are equipped with air conditioning, and some rooms are fitted with a terrace. At Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv all rooms are fitted with a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer.

Dizengoff Center is 2.4 km from the accommodation, while Tel Aviv Museum of Art is 2.5 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ben Gurion Airport, 26 km from the property.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Tel Aviv, il Jacob Samuel Hotel Tel Aviv si trova a 600 metri da Hilton Beach. Tra i rinomati punti dГўвӮ¬в„ўinteresse nelle vicinanze figurano la Gordon Pool, Piazza Dizengoff e Kikar Hamedina. LГўвӮ¬в„ўItzhak Rabin Memorial e il Meir Park distano rispettivamente 2 km e 2,3 km dalla struttura.

Tutte le sistemazioni sono provviste di macchina da caffГғВЁ. aria condizionata e, in alcuni casi, terrazza. Includono inoltre un bagno privato con set di cortesia e asciugacapelli.

La struttura si trova a 2,4 km dal Dizengoff Center, a 2,5 km dal Museo dГўвӮ¬в„ўarte di Tel Aviv e a 26 km dallГўвӮ¬в„ўaeroporto piГғВ№ vicino, quello di Tel Aviv-Ben-Gurion.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,5 per un viaggio a due.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Europa 1917 - Mehadrin Kosher suitable for Ultra-Orthodox guests
hotels.description_fr:
Offering an outdoor pool with a sun terrace, Europa 1917 Hotel is located in Tiberias and provides air-conditioned accommodation with free WiFi access.
All rooms come with a flat-screen satellite TV, some also comprising a seating area. Each has a safe, a desk, a minibar, an electric kettle and a coffee machine. The private bathrooms are fitted with a bath or a shower, a hairdryer and come with free toiletries, bathrobes and slippers.
At Europa 1917 Hotel, guests will find a kosher restaurant. The hotel is located in a historic building from 1917, preserving its authentic European elements. The beach is 200 metres away.
The Tomb of Maimonides is located at a distance of only 350 metres. The Gai Beach Water Park is within 1.5 km. A local bus stop is only 120 metres away from the property.

hotels.name: Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ
hotels.description_fr:
BГғВ©nГғВ©ficiant dГўвӮ¬в„ўun emplacement en bord de mer, lГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ vous accueille ГғВ  TibГғВ©riade, ГғВ  respectivement 1,1 km et 1,2 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : St. Peter's Church et Tomb of Maimonides. Cet appartement possГғВЁde une piscine privГғВ©e et se trouve dans une rГғВ©gion oГғВ№ vous pourrez pratiquer des activitГғВ©s telles que la randonnГғВ©e, le ski et la pГғВӘche.

Proposant un accГғВЁs direct ГғВ  un balcon avec vue sur la montagne, cet appartement avec climatisation comporte 1ГӮВ chambre et une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont ГғВ  votre disposition.

Vous pourrez profiter dГўвӮ¬в„ўune terrasse ainsi que dГўвӮ¬в„ўun barbecue sur place, et pratiquer le vГғВ©lo dans les environs.
hotels.description_en:
Beachfront and Terrace: Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ in Tiberias offers direct beachfront access and a spacious terrace. Guests can relax by the sea and enjoy stunning mountain views.
Comfortable Amenities: The apartment features air-conditioning, a balcony, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional amenities include a private pool, tea and coffee maker, and a work desk.
Convenient Services: Private check-in and check-out services ensure a smooth arrival and departure. A minimarket provides essential items, and breakfast is available in the room.
Local Attractions: St. Peter's Church is a 13-minute walk away, while the Tomb of Maimonides lies 1.2 km from the property. Haifa Airport is 56 km distant.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ es un alojamiento frente a la playa que estГғВЎ en TiberГғВӯades, a 13 min a pie de St. Peter's Church y a 1,2 km de Tomb of Maimonides. El apartamento, que tiene piscina privada, estГғВЎ en una zona en la que se pueden practicar actividades como senderismo, esquГғВӯ y pesca.

Este apartamento con aire acondicionado tiene acceso a un balcГғВіn con vistas a la montaГғВұa y cuenta con 1 dormitorio y cocina totalmente equipada. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el apartamento.

Hay terraza y barbacoa en este alojamiento, y en la zona se puede practicar ciclismo.

Monte Tabor estГғВЎ a 35 km del alojamiento, y The Scots Church estГғВЎ a 13 min a pie. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Haifa) estГғВЎ a 56 km.

Las distancias en la descripciГғВіn del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMapГӮВ©
hotels.description_pt:
Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ ГғВ© um alojamento em frente ГғВ  praia, em TiberГғВӯades, a 13 minutos a pГғВ© de St. Peter's Church e 1,2 km de Tomb of Maimonides. Apresentando uma piscina privada, este apartamento estГғВЎ numa ГғВЎrea onde os hГғВіspedes podem desfrutar de atividades como caminhadas, esqui e pesca.

Fornecendo acesso a uma varanda com vista da montanha, este apartamento com ar condicionado tem 1 quarto e uma cozinha totalmente equipada. Toalhas e roupa de cama sГғВЈo providenciadas neste apartamento.

Este alojamento possui um terraГғВ§o e comodidades para churrascos e os hГғВіspedes podem praticar ciclismo nas proximidades.

Monte Tabor fica a 35 km de Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ, enquanto The Scots Church estГғВЎ a 13 minutos a pГғВ© da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Haifa fica a 56 km de distГғВўncia.
hotels.description_it:
Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ ГғВЁ un alloggio fronte spiaggia ubicato a Tiberias, a 1,1 km da St. Peter's Church e 1,2 km da Tomb of Maimonides. L'appartamento dispone di piscina privata e si trova in una zona dove potrete praticare lГўвӮ¬в„ўescursionismo, lo sci e la pesca.

Con lГўвӮ¬в„ўaccesso a un balcone con vista sulla montagna, questo appartamento con aria condizionata comprende 1 camera da letto e una cucina con utensili. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi offerti.

Questo appartamento offre un barbecue. In loco ГғВЁ disponibile una terrazza, mentre nelle vicinanze di Г—ВӨГ—в„ўГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—В§Г—ЛңГ—В Г—вҖқ Г—вҖҳГ—Е“Г—вҖҳ-Г—В Г—вҖўГ—ВӨГ—В© Г—вҖҳГ—вҖәГ—В Г—ВЁГ—ВӘ potrete praticare il ciclismo.

Monte Tabor ГғВЁ a 35 km da questa struttura, mentre The Scots Church si trova a 1,1 km dalla struttura.

hotels.name: Berenice Winery Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Berenice Winery Hotel se situe ГғВ  TibГғВ©riade, ГғВ  quelques pas de ce lieu dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Tomb of Maimonides. Il possГғВЁde une piscine extГғВ©rieure, un jardin, un barbecue et un parking privГғВ© gratuit. Il est installГғВ© ГғВ  respectivement 600 mГғВЁtres, 34 km et 500 mГғВЁtres de : St. Peter's Church, Mont Thabor et The Scots Church. Les hГғВ©bergements comprennent une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et un balcon offrant une vue sur la ville.

Les hГғВ©bergements comprennent la climatisation, un bureau, une machine ГғВ  cafГғВ©, un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur, un micro-ondes, un coffre-fort, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, une terrasse et une salle de bains privative dotГғВ©e dГўвӮ¬в„ўune douche. Vous bГғВ©nГғВ©ficierez d'une bouilloire. Certains hГғВ©bergements possГғВЁdent une cuisine ГғВ©quipГғВ©e dГўвӮ¬в„ўune plaque de cuisson et dГўвӮ¬в„ўun grille-pain.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Berenice Winery Hotel in Tiberias offers a rooftop swimming pool, lush garden, and spacious terrace. Guests enjoy free WiFi throughout the property, ensuring connectivity and relaxation.
Comfortable Amenities: The guest house features private check-in and check-out services, a pool bar, outdoor seating area, picnic spots, family rooms, and barbecue facilities. Additional amenities include air-conditioning, balconies, and streaming services.
Prime Location: Located 55 km from Haifa Airport, the hotel is steps from the Tomb of Maimonides, a 7-minute walk to St. Peter's Church, and 500 metres from The Scots Church. Nearby attractions include Mount Tabor (34 km) and the Mount of Beatitudes (16 km). Highly rated by guests.
hotels.description_es:
Berenice Winery Hotel estГғВЎ en TiberГғВӯades, a pocos pasos de Tomb of Maimonides, y dispone de alojamiento con piscina al aire libre, parking privado gratis, jardГғВӯn y zona de barbacoa. El alojamiento estГғВЎ a unos 7 min a pie de St. Peter's Church, a 34 km de Monte Tabor y a 5 min a pie de The Scots Church. Cada habitaciГғВіn dispone de un balcГғВіn con vistas a la ciudad y wifi gratis.

El hostal o pensiГғВіn ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, cafetera, nevera, microondas, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana, terraza y baГғВұo privado con ducha. Todas las habitaciones disponen de hervidor, y algunas tambiГғВ©n ofrecen cocina con fogones y tostadora. En Berenice Winery Hotel, cada habitaciГғВіn cuenta con ropa de cama y toallas.
hotels.description_pt:
Berenice Winery Hotel situa-se em TiberГғВӯades, a alguns passos de Tomb of Maimonides, e dispГғВөe de acomodaГғВ§ГғВөes com uma piscina exterior, estacionamento privado gratuito, um jardim e comodidades para churrascos. O alojamento estГғВЎ a cerca de 7 minutos a pГғВ© de St. Peter's Church, a 34 km de Monte Tabor e a 5 minutos a pГғВ© de The Scots Church. Os quartos incluem varanda com vistas da cidade e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.

Este alojamento com ar condicionado providencia quartos com secretГғВЎria, mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ©, um frigorГғВӯfico, um micro-ondas, cofre, televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano, terraГғВ§o e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro. Cada quarto inclui chaleira, enquanto alguns quartos tambГғВ©m apresentam uma cozinha com uma placa de fogГғВЈo e uma torradeira. As unidades providenciam roupa de cama e toalhas.
hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a Tiberias, a 70 metri da Tomb of Maimonides, Berenice Winery Hotel mette a disposizione una piscina all'aperto, un parcheggio privato gratuito, un giardino e un barbecue. La struttura si trova a circa 600 metri da St. Peter's Church, 34 km da Monte Tabor e 500 metri da The Scots Church. Tutte le camere comprendono un balcone con vista sulla cittГғВ  e il WiFi gratuito.

Questo affittacamere offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate dotate di scrivania, macchina da caffГғВЁ, frigorifero, microonde, cassaforte e TV a schermo piatto. In piГғВ№ avrete a disposizione una terrazza e un bagno privato con doccia. Le camere sono provviste di un bollitore elettrico, mentre alcune camere dispongono anche di una cucina con un piano cottura e un tostapane.
